name: postgres-databases
description: Schema, query, index, migration, and recovery workflows for safe, evidence-based PostgreSQL engineering.

interface.shortDescription: Design and review safe, evidence-backed PostgreSQL changes.
interface.longDescription: Schema, query, index, migration, and recovery workflows for safe, evidence-based PostgreSQL engineering.
defaultPrompt: Use $postgres-schema-design to design a PostgreSQL schema from these domain invariants and workloads.
Use $postgres-query-performance-review to diagnose this PostgreSQL query from the available plan evidence.
Use $postgres-migration-safety to turn this PostgreSQL change into a safe production rollout plan.
Use $postgres-backup-recovery to assess this PostgreSQL recovery design against its RPO and RTO.
